headline: PPL : Danville City Commission honors KU lineman for historic achievements
summary: Today the Danville City Commission renamed South Street as Leon Smith Way. The honor recognizes Leon Smith's historic contributions to the community as the first African American lineman for Kentucky...

headline: PPL Corporation to Conduct Webcast on First-Quarter 2026 Earnings Results
summary: ALLENTOWN, Pa. - PPL Corporation will release consolidated first-quarter 2026 earnings results on Friday, May 8.Vincent Sorgi, PPL president and chief executive officer, and other members of PPL's...
